plan_name: Analytics, export, and schema API handlers: remaining 6 endpoints

tasks.name: Task 1: Analytics and schema endpoint handlers
tasks.notes: Created analytics.rs with 3 handlers (tokens with group_by dispatch, tools, models) and schema.rs with 2 handlers (versions, drift with record_type filter). All 5 handlers follow established conn.call pattern. Added pub mod declarations in mod.rs for the new modules.

tasks.name: Task 2: Export API handler and complete router with all 16 routes
tasks.notes: Created export_api.rs handler with format validation (json/markdown/csv), Content-Type header setting, and Vec<u8> buffer pattern inside conn.call. Export function errors (Box<dyn Error>) required string conversion before wrapping in rusqlite::Error::ToSqlConversionFailure because the original error type is not Send+Sync. Updated mod.rs build_router with all 16 routes across 7 resource groups plus TraceLayer middleware.

decisions.description: Export function error (Box<dyn Error>) mapped to string then wrapped in rusqlite::Error::ToSqlConversionFailure — the Box<dyn Error> from export functions lacks Send+Sync bounds required by the rusqlite error variant, so .to_string() is used first to capture the error message
